_doc: Ambient lines spoken by NPCs when the player lingers in an NPC-specific trigger zone. Read by scripts/actors/*_zone.gd. Code owns keys (npc_id); Design owns line text. Distinct from <npc>.json::idle_flavor, which is general-purpose self-talk shown at idle outside any zone.
asia: Dr. A. Cula? Are you looking for paperclips?
If you need to print something, just ask.
I would love to chat with you, but I have all this chaos to manage.
I'm wondering who even uses fax anymore.
pig: Every second you stand still, a client somewhere is also standing still. This is a coincidence I cannot afford.
Standing still is a philosophical position, Dr. A. Cula. I do not endorse it professionally.
